faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Greenburgh?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Greenburgh typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your property, severity of infestation, and treatment method chosen. We offer free inspections to provide accurate quotes for your specific situation.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Greenburgh homes?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments take 4-8 hours for an average home. Heat treatments can often be completed in one day, while chemical treatments may require follow-up visits 2-3 weeks later to ensure all bed bugs and eggs are eliminated.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe when applied by our certified technicians. For chemical treatments, we'll provide instructions for temporary relocation during application. Heat treatments are completely chemical-free and safe for immediate re-entry once complete.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your bed bug treatment in Greenburgh?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We offer a warranty on all bed bug treatments in Greenburgh. If bed bugs return within the warranty period, we'll re-treat your property at no additional cost. Our goal is complete elimination and your peace of mind.
